_comment: Example PLANET coefficients. The four *fit* values come from code/calibration/fit_model.py; the rest are grid + device-datasheet inputs. These illustrative defaults are NOT calibrated for any specific machine.

grid_input._note: Use your region's average or, better, marginal carbon intensity (e.g. Electricity Maps / WattTime). Can be updated live.

device_datasheet_input._note: 1.5e-8 gCO2e/byte ~= 15 gCO2e/GB embodied (enterprise SSD); 2.5e-12 W/byte ~= 5 W idle over a 2 TB device. Adjust per your storage media (HDD vs SSD vs NVMe).

apply: SELECT format('ALTER SYSTEM SET %s = %s;', key, value) FROM (VALUES ...) -- or just paste the SET statements printed by fit_model.py
